headline: 1 Services Stock to Research Further and 2 We Avoid
summary: Business services providers play a critical role for enterprises, assisting them with everything from new hardware integrations to consulting and marketing. These firms have helped their customers unlock huge efficiencies, so it’s no surprise the industry has posted a 14.2% gain over the past six months, nearly mirrorring the S&P 500.

headline: Top S&P500 movers in Thursday's session

headline: Equifax (EFX) Down 7.7% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Equifax (EFX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
